scenarios.title: Title screen is reachable on load
scenarios.expected: The title screen is displayed with logo and start prompt.

scenarios.title: Core gameplay is controllable
scenarios.expected: Gameplay starts, the ship moves responsively, and projectiles fire from the ship.

scenarios.title: Level progression occurs after clearing asteroids
steps: Destroy all asteroids in the current level
scenarios.expected: A new level begins with increased asteroid count and no state corruption.

scenarios.title: Pause and resume work reliably
scenarios.expected: The pause overlay appears and disappears, and gameplay resumes without drift or lockup.

scenarios.title: Lives decrement and game over is reachable
steps: Lose lives through collisions until zero remain
scenarios.expected: Lives decrement correctly and the game-over screen is shown when lives reach zero.

scenarios.title: Combo and extra life rules work
scenarios.expected: Combo increments and resets correctly, and extra lives are awarded at thresholds.

scenarios.title: Power-ups activate, replace, and expire correctly
scenarios.expected: All power-up rules including duration, replacement, stacking, and despawn are correct.

scenarios.title: Saucers spawn and interact correctly
scenarios.expected: Saucers spawn from edges, fire at the player, and award the correct score when destroyed.

scenarios.title: Leaderboard persists across sessions
preconditions: At least one completed game with a score
scenarios.expected: Saved scores persist and are displayed on the title screen leaderboard.

scenarios.title: Visibility pause works
steps: Switch browser tab or hide the tab
scenarios.expected: The game pauses on visibility loss and can be resumed without state drift.
